messages.content: who won map an app hackathon

Puli Bhavishwa Reddy won the "Map an App" Hackathon. This achievement is mentioned in his resume under the ACHIEVEMENTS section, where it states: "Winner of 'Map an App' Hackathon - Developed an innovative One-Tap Blood Donation App." [Document: resume_job.pdf]

**Sources:**
1. resume_job.pdf (Page 1)
